race.description: XXXX Sideline Beer Garden Book Now Hcp
race.comment: ALL ADORE (9) bolted in two back at the Sapphire Coast then made the long trek to Eagle Farm a fortnight ago and was even more impressive against smarter horses. Loving the soft tracks and with nothing on her back she can chalk up the hat trick. WONDEREACH (3) comes from NSW off a one-month let-up. Distance specialist who relishes the rain affected tracks. Hasn't won for 13 months but this is a suitable assignment. The speedy EN POINTE (2) has given cheek but been claimed late in her two runs this time in work. Ideally drawn and faces a massive drop in grade today so she is a key contender at the third run back. HEARTS ARE BETTER (5) steps up to Saturday grade off the back of a couple of nice midweek performances. Goes fast and should still be there at the business end. SURPRISE HONEY (6) found ALL ADORE far too good when resuming last time. Comes into contention should the track conditions improve.
